subcodes.first_line: O thou who art immersed in the gulf that brancheth from the Most Great Ocean and who gazeth upon the luminous horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتغمس فی الخلیج المنشعب من البحر الاعظم و الناظر الی الافق اللائح
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual transformation
